CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Auto-calculated. The difference between market value and the actual costs covered by buyer funding sources. This discount is considered Long-Term Community Investment. For files with a value in All Other Buyer's Settlement Costs (OLD), the formula is: Appraised Unrestricted Market Value plus Pre-Paids/Reserves plus All Other Buyer's Settlement Costs (OLD) minus Funding Source Total. For all other files, the formula is: Appraised Unrestricted Market Value plus Settlement Charges to Borrower plus Other Amounts Due From Buyer minus Funding Source Total. Note: In order for this formula field to populate, you must enter at a minimum: - A Buyer's Purchase Loan appraisal - At least one Funding Source - A date in Close Date - A value in Settlement Charges to Borrower (unless All Other Buyer's Settlement Costs (OLD) has a value)
CustomField.formula:
IF((ISNULL( HOMEtracker__Appraised_Unrestricted_Market_Value__c ) || HOMEtracker__Funding_Source_Total__c == 0 || (ISNULL(HOMEtracker__Close_Date__c) && ISNULL(HOMEtracker__Certified_Closed_Date__c ))), null,
IF(!ISNULL(HOMEtracker__All_Other_Buyers_Settlement_Costs__c),
(HOMEtracker__Appraised_Unrestricted_Market_Value__c + IF(ISNULL(HOMEtracker__Prepaids_Reserves__c), 0, HOMEtracker__Prepaids_Reserves__c) + HOMEtracker__All_Other_Buyers_Settlement_Costs__c - HOMEtracker__Funding_Source_Total__c),
(HOMEtracker__Appraised_Unrestricted_Market_Value__c + HOMEtracker__Settlement_Charges_to_Borrower__c + IF(ISNULL(HOMEtracker__Other_Amounts_Due_from_Buyer__c), 0, HOMEtracker__Other_Amounts_Due_from_Buyer__c) - HOMEtracker__Funding_Source_Total__c)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated. The difference between market value and the actual costs covered by buyer funding sources. This discount is considered Long-Term Community Investment.
CustomField.label: Discount Relative to Market Value
